items.title: 'Our horror is greater today than before,’ German FM says in reaction to Zelenskyy-Trump row
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>German Foreign Minister Annalena Baerbock said on Saturday “a new era of nefariousness” had begun in the wake of Trump’s treatment of Zelenskyy at the White House, but vowed that it would only increase her country’s commitment to Ukraine.

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home</article>

items.title: Revelers take to the streets of Rio
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Carnival started in Rio de Janeiro as revelers took to the streets to party in the first hours of Saturday, joining carnival gatherings all around the city. One of the popular early-morning “blocos” is Friends of the Jaguar, on a beach looking across the water at Rio de Janeiro’s Sugarloaf Mountain. (AP Video by Lucas Dumphreys)

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home</article>

items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy met UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer in Downing Street on Saturday ahead of crisis talks with other European leaders on Sunday.

items.content:
<article>The 47th edition of the Sydney Gay and Lesbian Mardi Gras parade took place on Saturday evening, marking the end of two weeks of festivities.

items.title: War-weary Palestinians in Gaza mark first day of Ramadan
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>War-weary Palestinians in Gaza marked the first day of the Muslim fasting month of Ramadan on Saturday amid the rubble of their houses and concerns that the Israel-Hamas war could resume.

items.title: FedEx cargo plane makes emergency landing following bird strike, engine fire
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>A FedEx cargo plane made an emergency landing at a busy New Jersey airport on Saturday after a bird strike caused an engine fire. There were no reported injuries.

items.title: BRIT Awards 2025: LIVE from the red carpet
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Live from the red carpet of the 2025 BRIT Awards in London. Beyoncé, Billie Eilish, Chappell Roan, Charli XCX, Dua Lipa, Kendrick Lamar, Sabrina Carpenter and Taylor Swift are among the nominees.

#britawards #live</article>

items.title: Judge blocks Trump order threatening funding for institutions that offer care for transgender youth
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>President Donald Trump’s plan to pull federal funding from institutions that provide gender-affirming care for transgender youth will remain blocked on a long-term basis under a federal judge's ruling in Seattle late Friday. (AP video: Manuel Valdes)

items.title: Ukrainians react to Zelenskyy and Trump's meeting in the Oval Office
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Soon after Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy left the White House on Friday after an astonishing Oval Office row with US President Donald Trump, Ukrainians rallied around Zelenskyy as a defender of his country’s interests. (AP video by Alex Babenko and produced by Dmytro Zhyhinas)

items.title: Rescuers and volunteers clear out debris amid latest drone attack in Ukraine's Kharkiv region
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Rescuers and volunteers in Ukraine's Kharkiv region worked to clear debris at a damaged medical facility on Saturday following an overnight Russian drone attack.

items.title: At least 4 construction workers are killed in an avalanche in northern India
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>At least four workers have died after an avalanche swept away a large construction crew working on a highway near India’s mountainous border with Tibet, Indian army said Saturday.

items.title: Pope Francis rests after coughing fit and vomiting crisis on Friday but condition remains complex, A
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Pope Francis suffered an isolated coughing fit on Friday that resulted in him inhaling vomit and requiring non-invasive mechanical ventilation, the Vatican said in relaying an alarming setback in his two-week long battle against double pneumonia.

items.title: Will people watch Trump's address to Congress?
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>President Donald Trump will deliver an unofficial state of the union address to a joint session of Congress on Tuesday. Some Americans will sing along, while others will plug their ears. (AP Video: Daniel Kozin, Tassanee Vejpongsa)
